ddls:
CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer (e.g., WELL, FIN) */,
  "mask_id" INTEGER /* Mask ID associated with the layer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer's function */,
  "lithography" TEXT /* Lithography technology used for the layer (e.g., EUV, 193i) */,
  "patterning" TEXT /* Patterning technique used for the layer (e.g., SE, SADP) */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the layer */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material used for the layer (e.g., silicon, metal, dielectric) */,
  "patterning_method_id" INTEGER /* Patterning method ID associated with the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_patterning_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("patterning_method_id") REFERENCES patterning_methods ("patterning_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "masks" (
  "mask_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mask */,
  "mask_name" TEXT /* Name of the mask */,
  "mask_type" TEXT /* Type of the mask (e.g., photomask, etch mask) */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer associated with this mask */,
  "design_date" TEXT /* Date when the mask design was created */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who designed the mask */,
  "mask_status" TEXT /* Current status of the mask (e.g., active, inactive, in_use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mask_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_masks_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production run */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer being processed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the production run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the production run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the run (e.g., completed, ongoing, failed) */,
  "yield_rate" REAL /* Yield rate of the production run as a percentage */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the production run */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who operated the equipment during the production run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the production run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material (e.g., silicon, aluminum) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the material used */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer associated with this material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the material */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the material */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the quality check */,
  "checked_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  "check_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality check method used */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_checks_check_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_method_id") REFERENCES quality_check_methods ("check_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_checks_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., engineering, quality assurance, management) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Specific resource that was accessed (e.g., layer, mask, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer associated with this report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing findings and metrics */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., production efficiency, quality metrics) */,
  "generated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patterning_methods" (
  "patterning_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patterning method */,
  "patterning_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the patterning method (e.g., SE, SADP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patterning method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patterning_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., lithography tool, etcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the supplier (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_check_methods" (
  "check_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check method */,
  "check_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality check method (e.g., visual inspection, electrical testing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality check method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_method_id")
)
